prose: Make a cupped hand at the chin, palm facing up, fingertips pointing toward the signer. No movement.

gaps.reason: 'cupped hand' could be a C-hand (wider curve, fingers together) or a flat-O (tighter, fingertips-to-thumb-tip) or a bent-5 (curled but fingers apart)
gaps.suggested_question: Is the cup shape a C-hand (fingers together forming a C), a flat-O (fingertips touching thumb), or a bent-5 (claw)?
